title: erythroxylum betulaceum
intro: Erythroxylum betulaceum, also known as the "Betula tree" or "Willow-leafed coca tree," is a plant species belonging to the Erythroxylum genus. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Erythroxylum betulaceum include relief from pain and inflammation, as well as its potential to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the leaves and bark of the plant are typically dried and made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
